Game.Name: Sound Novel Tsukuru (Japan)
Game.plot: Sound Novel Tsukuru is a Miscellaneous game, developed by Success and published by ASCII Entertainment,which was released in Japan in 1996.
Game.Notes: Sound Novel Tsukuru is a Super Famicom graphic novel game where players can either read or create interactive fiction on their own console systems. Stories can be saved either on a battery or through a satellite connection. The game comes with a previously created graphic novel about exploring an old house. Due to the limitations in the game's engine, it can only show shadows of non-player characters that the player meets on his journey. Settings can range from a modern day train to a rural house and even wilderness can be included in various stages of wildness.
